articles.title: Can activation verbalizers surface an internal chain of thought?
articles.summary:
We introduce an evaluation for activation verbalizers: can they surface a target model's reasoning as it solves a math problem in a single forward pass? For open-weight NLAs, the answer seems to be: "possibly, but definitely not reliably".

articles.title: Frontier Models Still Lag Behind Humans at Robust Belief-State Tracking
articles.summary: Large-scale cooperation has been a central feature of humanity’s ability to advance technology and build complex societies. articles.title: The Diamond Lemma
articles.summary: I found this result useful for a few different problems I was thinking about recently. It cleared up a lot of confusion I had around simplification rules. First I give a semiformal statement of the lemma and some applications. At the end I give a formal statement and proof.
